title: sambucus laciniata
intro: Sambucus laciniata, also known as the cut-leaved elder or cut-leaf elderberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which contain anthocyanins and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sambucus laciniata include its ability to support immune function, reduce cold and flu symptoms, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Sambucus laciniata is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
